instruction: Générer dans ChatGPT / outil image avec l'ancre ci-dessus en pièce jointe. Copier le PNG validé : node scripts/staging/copy-generated-visual.mjs <fichier> staging/companion-visual-pack/disagrea/etna/tests/allfours-batch/<output>
sharedPromptTail: SAME gothic bedroom as reference image: dark ornate carved headboard, rumpled dark purple satin sheets, scattered purple rose petals, glowing purple lanterns, white candles on nightstands, tall window with crescent moon and distant gothic castle spires, moody romantic purple atmosphere. POSE CRITICAL: Etna on all fours on the bed, strict SIDE VIEW (camera perpendicular to bed, profile body), head turned toward viewer/camera, BIG happy mischievous smile, direct eye contact with viewer. Etna demon vassal girl: magenta pink twin ponytails, red eyes, small horns, bat wings, heart-tip demon tail, black lace bikini top, black shorts, white studded belt red gem buckle, skull earrings, choker, fingerless lace gloves, barefoot. MATCH soft painterly modern anime gacha style of reference exactly. Adult suggestive tasteful romantic, NO explicit nudity, adult consenting character. No text, no watermark.

variants.lighting: warm candlelight dominant, soft golden rim on hair and wings
cool blue moonlight from window mixing with faint candle glow, stronger contrast
balanced purple ambient; heart-tip tail curved upward, bat wings slightly spread open
soft diffuse purple; tail draped along sheets behind legs, wings folded neatly on back
dramatic rim light on ponytails; most playful energetic big smile, hair tails flowing with motion
